SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class WaitingListController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.WaitingListController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class WaitingListController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Waiting List UI. Allows managers/employees to view and manage customers in the waiting list.
